long long solve(std::vector<long long> landStartTime, std::vector<long long> landDuration, std::vector<long long> waterStartTime, std::vector<long long> waterDuration) {
    // Calculate the earliest possible end time for each combination of land and water rides
    long long min_time = LONG_LONG_MAX;
    
    // Try each land ride followed by each water ride
    for (int i = 0; i < landStartTime.size(); ++i) {
        // Start the land ride at its earliest possible time
        long long land_end = std::max(landStartTime[i], (long long)0) + landDuration[i];
        
        // Start the water ride as soon as possible after the land ride ends
        long long water_start = std::max(land_end, waterStartTime[0]);
        long long water_end = water_start + waterDuration[0];
        
        min_time = std::min(min_time, water_end);
    }
    
    // Try each water ride followed by each land ride
    for (int j = 0; j < waterStartTime.size(); ++j) {
        // Start the water ride at its earliest possible time
        long long water_end = std::max(waterStartTime[j], (long long)0) + waterDuration[j];
        
        // Start the land ride as soon as possible after the water ride ends
        long long land_start = std::max(water_end, landStartTime[0]);
        long long land_end = land_start + landDuration[0];
        
        min_time = std::min(min_time, land_end);
    }
    
    return min_time;
}

    % Calculate the earliest possible end time for each combination of land and water rides
    MinTime = find_min_time(land_start_times, land_durations, water_start_times, water_durations),
    MinTime.

find_min_time(land_start_times, land_durations, water_start_times, water_durations) ->
    % Try each land ride followed by each water ride
    LandWaterMin = land_water_min(land_start_times, land_durations, water_start_times, water_durations),

    min(LandWaterMin, WaterLandMin).

land_water_min(land_start_times, land_durations, water_start_times, water_durations) ->
    % Try each land ride followed by each water ride
    lists:foldl(
        fun({Ls, Ld}, Acc) ->
            LandEnd = max(Ls, 0) + Ld,
            WaterStart = max(LandEnd, lists:nth(1, water_start_times)),
            WaterEnd = WaterStart + lists:nth(1, water_durations),
            min(Acc, WaterEnd)
        end,
        infinity,
        lists:zip(land_start_times, land_durations)
    ).

water_land_min(land_start_times, land_durations, water_start_times, water_durations) ->
    % Try each water ride followed by each land ride
    lists:foldl(
        fun({Ws, Wd}, Acc) ->
            WaterEnd = max(Ws, 0) + Wd,
            LandStart = max(WaterEnd, lists:nth(1, land_start_times)),
            LandEnd = LandStart + lists:nth(1, land_durations),
            min(Acc, LandEnd)
        end,
        infinity,
        lists:zip(water_start_times, water_durations)
    ).

min(A, B) when A =< B -> A;
min(A, B) -> B.

#include <vector>

long long solve(std::vector<long long> landStartTime, std::vector<long long> landDuration, std::vector<long long> waterStartTime, std::vector<long long> waterDuration) {
    // Calculate the earliest possible end time for each combination of land and water rides
    long long min_time = LONG_LONG_MAX;
    
    // Try each land ride followed by each water ride
    for (int i = 0; i < landStartTime.size(); ++i) {
        // Start the land ride at its earliest possible time
        long long land_end = std::max(landStartTime[i], (long long)0) + landDuration[i];
        
        // Start the water ride as soon as possible after the land ride ends
        long long water_start = std::max(land_end, waterStartTime[0]);
        long long water_end = water_start + waterDuration[0];
        
        min_time = std::min(min_time, water_end);
    }
    
    // Try each water ride followed by each land ride
    for (int j = 0; j < waterStartTime.size(); ++j) {
        // Start the water ride at its earliest possible time
        long long water_end = std::max(waterStartTime[j], (long long)0) + waterDuration[j];
        
        // Start the land ride as soon as possible after the water ride ends
        long long land_start = std::max(water_end, landStartTime[0]);
        long long land_end = land_start + landDuration[0];
        
        min_time = std::min(min_time, land_end);
    }
    
    return min_time;
}
